title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Kozuki Retainers, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Oden, Unknown person #8 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: White- Beard's ship is also gone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot find big bro 120, either!! And doggy and Kitty are missing, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Search for them first!! Search the entire country!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Pull Lord open up, white- beard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is going to die at this rate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The future of Wano rests on his shoulders!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: boy... you saw how many times I turned him down, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet he's still determined to join us and go out to sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't just welcome such a wild person into the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He could end up endampering my family...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll have to convince me, if he wants to change his fate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hear that, Oden!!? Three days!! If you can keep hold of that chain for the next three days...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He is....!! the guy's unbeliev- able....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: although... he's so swollen now, it's hard to tell if he's the same person!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't give up, Oden!! You've only got one hour left!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Isn't it a bit too soon to start rooting for him like he's one of us!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don'tcha think he's pretty much one of us already?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For making my master go through all this, whitebeard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you running away from us, woman? Gyahaha!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Come on, we're not gonna hurt you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: We promise we'll take you to Wano!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
